_comment: Canonical on-chain addresses for the ConCon ($CON) project. Public addresses, not secrets. Locked 2026-06-24. Single source of truth for downstream contracts, scripts and frontend.

mainnet._note: $CON is live on Ethereum mainnet at the token address above. The deploy script targets testnet; on mainnet it is reference/verification only.

sepolia._note: Token left blank until a test copy of ConToken is deployed to Sepolia; fill in after deploy.
